SEARCH
程序包 com.example.syntaxappproject

类 AdminEventAdapter

java.lang.Object
androidx.recyclerview.widget.RecyclerView.Adapter<com.example.syntaxappproject.AdminEventAdapter.EventViewHolder>
com.example.syntaxappproject.AdminEventAdapter
public class AdminEventAdapter extends androidx.recyclerview.widget.RecyclerView.Adapter<com.example.syntaxappproject.AdminEventAdapter.EventViewHolder>
RecyclerView adapter for displaying a list of events to admin users.

This adapter is used in AdminBrowseEvents to display all events in the system. Each event card displays:

  • Event title/name
  • Organizer name (fetched asynchronously from profiles collection)
  • Organizer UID
  • Event location
  • Details button to navigate to AdminEventDetails for full event management

The organizer name is fetched asynchronously from the profiles collection using the organizer's UID, with a "Loading..." placeholder while the fetch is in progress.

另请参阅:
  • EventDetail
  • AdminBrowseEvents
  • AdminEventDetails

  • 构造器详细资料

    • AdminEventAdapter

      public AdminEventAdapter(ArrayList<EventDetail> eventList, ArrayList<String> eventIds)
      Constructs the adapter with event data and their corresponding Firestore document IDs.
      参数:
      eventList - list of event detail objects
      eventIds - list of Firestore document IDs matching the events

  • 方法详细资料

    • onCreateViewHolder

      @NonNull public com.example.syntaxappproject.AdminEventAdapter.EventViewHolder onCreateViewHolder(@NonNull android.view.ViewGroup parent, int viewType)
      Creates and inflates the view holder for an event item.
      指定者:
      onCreateViewHolder 在类中 androidx.recyclerview.widget.RecyclerView.Adapter<com.example.syntaxappproject.AdminEventAdapter.EventViewHolder>
      参数:
      parent - the parent view group
      viewType - the view type (unused, single type)
      返回:
      a new EventViewHolder

    • onBindViewHolder

      public void onBindViewHolder(@NonNull com.example.syntaxappproject.AdminEventAdapter.EventViewHolder holder, int position)
      Binds event data to the view holder at the given position.

      Sets the event title, location, and organizer UID. Fetches the organizer's name asynchronously from the profiles collection and updates the view when the data is loaded.

      指定者:
      onBindViewHolder 在类中 androidx.recyclerview.widget.RecyclerView.Adapter<com.example.syntaxappproject.AdminEventAdapter.EventViewHolder>
      参数:
      holder - the view holder to bind data to
      position - the position of the item in the list

    • getItemCount

      public int getItemCount()
      Returns the total number of events in the list.
      指定者:
      getItemCount 在类中 androidx.recyclerview.widget.RecyclerView.Adapter<com.example.syntaxappproject.AdminEventAdapter.EventViewHolder>
      返回:
      the number of events

    • updateData

      public void updateData(List<EventDetail> newEventList, List<String> newEventIds)
      Updates the adapter with new data and refreshes the RecyclerView.

      This method clears the existing lists and replaces them with the new data, then notifies the RecyclerView to redraw. Used primarily for search/filtering in AdminBrowseEvents.

      参数:
      newEventList - the new list of events
      newEventIds - the new list of event IDs
